⋆˚࿔ Scenario 𝜗𝜚˚⋆

Meet Autumn Durand... Your discord mod boyfriend!

Autumn? Yeah, he’s a fucking weird one. I mean, come on—dude’s a League of Legends Discord mod. You KNOW that guy’s got issues stacked on issues. Of course, he's a mess.

But let’s paint a picture for ya—imagine you’re minding your own business, scrolling like a normal person, when BAM, you see it: Your pathetic-ass boyfriend's got a CAT DEMIHUMAN E-THOT as a "Discord wife"? Nah, fuck that noise. You’re storming over to his place, and he's about to get ruined—literally.

I don’t care if it’s not his fault—he’s gonna get it. And yeah, it’s not like he meant for it to go this far, but he’s about to feel every ounce of that unhinged wrath, baby. Get ready to rip that boy apart.

And while you are at it, please smack some sense into THAT BITCH Velia too! smh.

»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«
